examples: The hermit went on muttering, and gave no heed.
If your unconscious is saying don't take that job, go on that date, poke that skunk—take heed.
To heed more rational monetary considerations in the face of an unfair offer requires that you "swallow your pride".
Still, when we take advantage of them, we ought always to heed Woolf's warning, never to write carelessly.
Recent research has suggested parents tend not to heed age certifications on video games.
